content.speakerText: Do you use Reels? I'm obsessed with the new filters.
content.speakerTextCn: 你用Reels吗？我超爱那些新滤镜。

options.text: I use it for work—it's great for reaching a broad audience.
I hate it because it's too slow to load.
I only use it to check the weather.
I don't have a phone, so I can't use any apps.

content.explanation: 正确答案回应了Reels的功能（用于工作和扩大受众），符合对话中‘我用来工作’的语境。干扰项一是关于加载速度（无关），二是关于查天气（完全不相关），三是关于没有手机（与对话前提矛盾）

content.speakerText: Why do you use Threads? Isn't it just Twitter 2.0?

options.text: It's less toxic and better for meaningful conversations.
I use it because it has better video editing tools.
It's the only app that lets me post photos.
I use it to avoid talking to anyone.

content.explanation: 正确答案使用了对话中的关键词‘less toxic’和‘meaningful conversations’，符合对比平台的语境。干扰项一是错误地强调视频编辑（非Threads核心），二是说‘唯一发照片的平台’（不真实），三是逻辑矛盾（避免交流≠使用社交平台）

content.speakerText: What do you think about Instagram Stories compared to regular posts?
content.speakerTextCn: 你觉得Instagram Stories和普通帖子相比怎么样？

options.text: I prefer Stories because they're temporary and feel more authentic.
I only use Stories to post my bank statements.
Stories are worse because they cost money to post.
I don't use any social media because I'm allergic to screens.

content.explanation: 正确答案使用了‘temporary’和‘authentic’这两个与Stories功能相符的关键词。干扰项一是荒谬的用途（银行对账单），二是错误声称收费（Stories免费），三是完全脱离现实（对屏幕过敏）

content.template: I'm ___ with the new filters on Reels—they're so much fun!
content.hint: 表达强烈喜爱时，常用 'I'm obsessed with...' 这个句型
content.knowledgePoint: 情感表达固定搭配（be obsessed with）

content.template: I use Threads because it's ___ toxic than Twitter and my friends are there.
content.hint: 比较两个平台时，用 'less' 或 'more' 来表达程度差异
content.knowledgePoint: 比较级用法（less/more + 形容词）

content.template: I post on TikTok mainly ___ reach younger audiences for my business.
content.hint: 表达目的时，常用 'use... to do...' 结构
content.knowledgePoint: 动词不定式表目的（use to do）

content.speakerText: Do you use Reels? I'm obsessed with the new filters.
content.speakerTextCn: 你用Reels吗？我超爱那些新滤镜。
expectedAnswers: Totally! The dancing ones are my favorite—so addictive!
I use them for my small business; they help me get noticed.
Not really—I find them distracting and stick to regular posts.
evaluationCriteria: 是否回应了Reels的使用意图（娱乐/工作/拒绝）
是否使用了场景关键词如obsessed, filters, dancing, static pics
表达是否自然流畅，符合口语习惯

content.speakerText: Why do you use Threads? Isn't it just Twitter 2.0?
expectedAnswers: It's less crowded and more respectful—perfect for real talks.
I don't get why people use it; X does everything better.
Threads is great for long-form posts and deeper connections.
evaluationCriteria: 是否清晰对比了Threads与其他平台（如X/Twitter）
是否使用了less/more/just等对比关键词
语言是否自然，是否避免机械重复原句

content.speakerText: Which social media feature do you think is the most useful, and why?
content.speakerTextCn: 你认为哪个社交媒体功能最有用？为什么？
expectedAnswers: I think Stories are the most useful because they feel personal and disappear after 24 hours.
DMs—they let me chat privately with friends without posting publicly.
Reels for discovery; I’ve found so many small businesses through trending videos.
evaluationCriteria: 是否明确指出一个具体功能（如Stories, DMs, Reels）
是否给出合理且具体的理由（使用场景、情感、实用性）
是否使用了场景相关词汇（discovery, private, trending, authentic）
